figures.figure_focus: Logistic regression computational graph

figures.visual_description: A computational graph for regularized logistic regression shows how the prediction and loss are built from inputs x, y, parameters α and β, and regularization strength λ. figures.figure_focus: Regularized logistic regression computational graph
